title: Post-operative pain review

treatment_and_management.text: Supports functional pain assessment, complex pain or pain-service review, discharge communication, and clinician-arranged follow-up without autonomous treatment.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports functional pain assessment, complex-pain review and follow-up for post-operative pain review; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports functional pain assessment, complex pain or pain-service review, discharge communication, and clinician-arranged follow-up without autonomous treatment.

source.title: Surgery and Opioids: Best Practice Guidelines 2021

exact_section.heading: Recovery, discharge, pain service, and follow-up
exact_section.locator: PDF PACU, discharge, and follow-up recommendations

medication.text: Supports a clinician-entered, patient-discussed perioperative pain plan and communication without medicine names, dose, or taper instructions.
medication.rationale: Supports a patient-discussed clinician-entered perioperative pain plan for post-operative pain review; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports a clinician-entered, patient-discussed perioperative pain plan and communication without medicine names, dose, or taper instructions.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Procedure and date, pain site and severity, rest and movement, function, medicines and doses, adverse effects, wound, complications and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for post-operative pain review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
